meaning: n.财物的增加,财富的获取,利润,腰槽,收获vt.得到,增进,赚到,开腰槽于vi.获利,增加
examples: Regular exercise helps prevent weight gain.
The minuses far outweigh that possible gain.
The research investigates how foreign speakers gain fluency.
Either way, the assets grow tax-deferred and withdrawals are taxed as ordinary income, not capital gain.
The result is a 192% average gain from first-day close over the past three years.
